title: Cafe Coffee Day is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cafe Coffee Day is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
